title: OpenClaw GPT-5 overlay should apply for aggregator providers

source.license_note: Localized ACBench reproduction derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #63076.

task.summary: Repair GPT-5 prompt overlay resolution so aggregator providers also receive the overlay.
task.instructions: Investigate why aggregator-backed GPT-5 models miss the overlay, repair the provider/model matching logic, and preserve the direct OpenAI behavior and non-GPT-5 exclusions.
task.acceptance_notes: Alternative fixes are allowed as long as GPT-5 aggregator models receive the overlay without regressing the existing direct-provider behavior.

visible_context.issue_text: GPT-5 prompt overlay sections show up for direct OpenAI models but disappear when the same GPT-5 model is served through OpenRouter or OpenCode.
error_logs: aggregator provider produced a prompt without `## Interaction Style`
direct OpenAI provider still included the GPT-5 overlay sections
reproduction_steps: Run the unit tests from the repository root.
visible_context.notes: This fixture focuses on provider/model overlay selection, not the full OpenClaw extension runtime.

code_fault.description: Aggregator-backed GPT-5 models do not receive the overlay because the provider/model matching logic is too narrow.

constraints.notes: This GitHub-derived reproduction is expected to be repaired in code, not by changing tests.
